data.content: Key files: src/lib/openrouter-session-runtime.ts (formatLeasePrompt lines 45-63, buildSystemPrompt lines 65-72, WORKER_TOOL_DEFS lines 18-27), src/lib/local-worker.ts (BLOCKED_SHELL_COMMANDS line 10, runTool lines 92-117). The queueTerminalInvariantInstruction is built in terminal-manager.ts and passed via RuntimeSessionContext. For OpenRouter workers, state advancement happens automatically via completeIteration — the agent never needs to call kno next.
